title: I Pay My Kids | #shorts
full_text: V, I have a job for you to do this holiday, this spring break when you have. Will you do it for me, please? I'll pay you. It's a paid position. Uh, yeah, why not? Okay. What is it? I need you to clean up my Google inbox, please. Mom, you've been complaining about this all week. I know this is a trick. You have a million unread emails. We So, that's the whole job is to clean out the the unread emails. I can't get a million done until like 3072. No, you can get it done. If I pay you, you'll get it done. Right, Tra? Will you do it for me, please? No. Yes. I said I'd pay you. Do you know how good parents I think I'm offering to pay you? How much? A dollar an hour. I'm pretty sure minimum wage is $15 an hour. You have a right to remain silent.
